chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-754 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 2573/18 2. For orders on 2574/18 3. For orders on MA 2575/18 06.06.2018. Mr. Muntazir Mehdi, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, Assistant Attorney General. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exception. 3. By way of instant application, the petitioner has sought for initiating the contempt proceedings against SHO PS Jhudo District Mirpurkhas only for the reason he has failed to extend protection to the petitioner in terms of order dated 21.5.2018 of this Court. The petitioner has not been able to satisfy the Court under what circumstances the SHO PS Jhudo has failed to provide protection to her in terms of order dated 21.5.2018 of this Court, he may justify initiating contempt proceeding against him. The instant application being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
